item.title: Negotiate Your Worth with Confidence 💪 • Research market rates for your role. • Highlight your unique skills and successes. • Be ready to discuss your desired salary range. • Use: “I am excited about the role and would like to discuss the offer.” • Practice your pitch to stay calm and confident. 🎯 How can you leverage your achievements to justify a higher salary? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Negotiate Your Worth with Confidence 💪 • Research market rates for your role. • Highlight your unique skills and successes. • Be ready to discuss your desired salary range. • Use: “I am excited about the role and would like to discuss the offer.” • Practice your pitch to stay calm and confident. 🎯 How can you leverage your achievements to justify a higher salary? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
